summary: Comprehensive testing of Sahub team management tool completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI and integration testing passed with excellent ChatGPT-like design implementation. Role-based permissions working correctly.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

passed_tests: User registration with all roles (admin, manager, member)
JWT token validation and user profile retrieval
Dashboard stats display and recent tasks
Task CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Task filtering by status (all, todo, in_progress, completed)
Task assignment to users with priority and due dates
Company updates CRUD with role-based permissions
Role-based access control (admin/manager can create/delete updates, members cannot)
ChatGPT-like sticky bottom input for task creation
Sidebar navigation with user profile and role badge
Clean, modern design with Outfit and IBM Plex Sans fonts
Proper error handling and toast notifications
